title: viola × militaris
intro: Viola × militaris, also known as the Japanese or common pimpernel, is a perennial flowering plant in the violet family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Viola × militaris is often used in teas, tinctures, and ointments to support skin health and treat various conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
